name: claude-architect-marketplace
description: A curated collection of plugins for software architecture design, analysis, documentation, and diagramming. Built for experienced software engineers who need quality architectural artifacts before code production.

plugins.name: architecture-design
plugins.description: Design software architectures from scratch. Create system designs, component structures, and technical specifications with structured thinking and industry patterns.

plugins.name: architecture-analysis
plugins.description: Analyze existing codebases and architectures. Identify patterns, anti-patterns, dependencies, and improvement opportunities in current systems.

plugins.name: diagrams-as-code
plugins.description: Generate architecture diagrams as code using Mermaid, PlantUML, D2, and other formats. Create visual representations of systems, flows, and structures.

plugins.name: architecture-docs
plugins.description: Generate architecture documentation including ADRs, C4 model docs, technical specs, and design documents. Structured templates for consistent documentation.

plugins.name: architecture-review
plugins.description: Review and critique architectural decisions. Evaluate designs against best practices, identify risks, and suggest improvements.
